REMARKS:
Executive Order No. 29, Series of 2025 dated November 08, 2025 at 11:34 AM - An Order Suspending Classes in All Levels of Public and Private Schools & Work in Public Offices in the Province of Ilocos Sur on 10 November 2025, as a preemptive measure in response to Typhoon
“UWANG” (FUNG-WONG).

Executive Order No. 31, Series of 2025 dated November 10, 2025 at 09:07 PM
-An order adopting the suspension of classes and extending the suspension of work in public offices in the province of Ilocos Sur until 11 November 2025, in view of ongoing risks from Typhoon “UWAN” (FUNG-WONG) and in support of disaster response operations.
Executive Order No. 36 'Classes in all public and private schools (all levels) will be suspended on Monday, November 10, 2025, due to the anticipated effects of TC Uwan'
Presidential Memorandum Circular No. 106 (Class suspension on 10-11 November 2025)
